compiled_state.title: code-reviewer-standard returns findings missing required score dimensions (hygiene)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Standard-tier reviewer (dso:code-reviewer-standard) returned reviewer-findings.json missing the 'hygiene' score dimension, causing record-review.sh to fail with 'ERROR: reviewer missing score dimension: hygiene'. All 5 dimensions (correctness, verification, hygiene, design, maintainability) are required by schema. The agent re-dispatched to recover. Root cause: LLM-behavioral — reviewer prompt does not enforce all 5 dimensions are present.
